<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in every section.
The pr-checks workflow will fail if "## Summary" or "## Test plan" is missing.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing WHAT changed and WHY (not how). -->

-

## Linked issues / ADRs

<!-- Closes #123 / Refs ADR-049 / etc. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature (user-facing)
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behaviour difference
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, infra

## Test plan

<!--
Concrete steps the reviewer can run, or a description of the automated coverage.
At least one bullet is required.
-->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- Required for any UI change. Drag & drop here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (lint + format passing).
- [ ] Tests added/updated; coverage gate respected (>= 70% backend).
- [ ] Docs/ADRs updated if applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env*` committed.
- [ ] Migrations are reversible (`alembic downgrade` tested) if applicable.
- [ ] Breaking change? Listed in CHANGELOG and called out below.

## Breaking changes

<!-- If none, write "None". -->

None
